nasb.text: After saying above, “Sacrifices and offerings and whole burnt offerings and  sacrifices  for sin You have not desired, nor have You taken pleasure  in them” (which are offered according to the Law),

esv.text: When he said above, “You have neither desired nor taken pleasure in sacrifices and offerings and burnt offerings and sin offerings” (these are offered according to the law),

cnv.text: 前面說：“祭品和禮物，燔祭和贖罪祭，不是你所要的，也不是你所喜悅的。”這些都是按照律法獻的；

ccb.text: 基督首先说：“祭物、供物、燔祭和赎罪祭都不是你想要的，也不是你喜悦的。”这些都是依照律法献上的。

csbs.text: 上文说：祭物、供物、燔祭和赎罪祭不是你所希望的，也不是你所喜悦的，尽管这些都是照着律法献上的；
